question: What is the main difficulty in interpreting this revenue chart from 1924 to 2024?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is hard to distinguish detailed changes in revenue over time.
options.B: Revenue clearly increased at a constant rate throughout the entire period.
options.C: Revenue clearly decreased in every decade shown.
options.D: The chart shows that revenue was identical in all years.

explanation: Revenue declined from 1980 to 1990. The extremely small axis labels can make it hard to read which period had the decline.
